MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ROUSSEL, ERIC HEARING SET FOR FEB-27-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ERIC ROUSSEL'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY. (CCP 473(B).) DEFAULT JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED ON JUNE 5, 2013. ON JULY 7, 2013, DEFENDANT ROUSSEL FILED A MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT THAT WAS DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE, FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE A COPY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE ON AUGUST 20, 2013. ON SEPTEMBER 11, 2013, DEFENDANT ROUSSEL FILED A MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT THAT WAS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 2, 2013. ON DECEMBER 2, 2013, THE MOTION WAS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR IN LIGHT OF THE FILING OF AN AMENDED MOTION THAT WAS SET FOR HEARING ON JANUARY 7, 2014. ON JANUARY 7, 2014, THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER OFF CALENDAR BECAUSE NO PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION WAS PROVIDED. ON JANUARY 24, 2014, DEFENDANT ROUSSEL FILED THE INSTANT MOTION, WHICH WAS NOT TIMELY FILED WITHIN SIX MONTHS OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT ROUSSEL'S RELIANCE ON CCP 473.5 IS NOT DISPOSITIVE AS DEFENDANT ROUSSEL ADMITS SERVICE OF SUMMONS THAT RESULTED IN ACTUAL NOTICE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: ANGIE DINER, CSR # 9581

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ERIC ROUSSELL, TEL. NO. 528-0227, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ERIC ROUSSEL's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT is Denied. The motion is untimely. (CCP 473(b).) Default judgment was entered on June 5, 2013. On July 7, 2013, Defendant Roussel filed a motion to set aside default/default judgment that was denied, without prejudice, for failure to provide a copy of the proof of service on August 20, 2013. On September 11, 2013, Defendant Roussel filed a motion to set aside/vacate judgment that was continued to December 2, 2013. On December 2, 2013, the motion was taken off calendar in light of the filing of an Amended Motion that was set for hearing on January 7, 2014. On January 7, 2014, the Court took the matter off calendar because no proof of service of motion was provided. On January 24, 2014, Defendant Roussel filed the instant motion, which was not timely filed within six months of default judgment. Defendant Roussel's reliance on CCP 473.5 is not dispositive as Defendant Roussel admits service of summons that resulted in actual notice. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Angie Diner, CSR # 9581

AMENDED MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Text Ruling

Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Continued To Dec-02-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ERIC ROUSSEL, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ERIC ROUSSEL'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is Continued to December 2, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 13, 2013, at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
